attributes.description: Alerts when average peak latency exceeds 500 ms. High latency risks Kafka broker session timeouts.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] High request latency

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper high request latency

### What fired
Average peak latency exceeded 500 ms during the window.

### Why it matters
Sustained high latency in ZooKeeper cascades into session timeouts for Kafka / HBase / Curator clients — often causing downstream rebalances.

### Triage
1. Check disk latency for txn log fsyncs.
2. Inspect CPU and GC on ensemble members.

### Remediation
- Move ZK to dedicated fast storage.

### Tuning
- 500 ms threshold.
